pr.title: gr cleanup, internal ID fixes/additions, part 1
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Ground/stage cleanup PR that renamed many gr functions from address/UnkStage names to callback-role names, fixed and added internal stage IDs, and changed StageData users to use the internal stage ID rather than treating the first field as a flag. The bot report recorded +212 matched-code bytes and one new match in main/melee/gr/gricemt.

Scratch entry updated to track renamed grFigureGet_OnInit.
Ground forward declarations expanded/adjusted for renamed callback functions.
Ground type definitions adjusted for internal stage ID / StageData semantics.
evidence_refs: pr_body: switches StageData usages to correctly use internal stage ID

key_files.path: src/melee/gr/grcastle.c, src/melee/gr/grflatzone.c, src/melee/gr/grgarden.c, src/melee/gr/grgreatbay.c, src/melee/gr/grmaterial.h, src/melee/gr/grmutecity.c, src/melee/gr/grshrine.c, src/melee/gr/grshrineroute.c, src/melee/gr/grstory.c, src/melee/gr/grtclink.c, src/melee/gr/grtdonkey.c, src/melee/gr/grtdrmario.c, src/melee/gr/grtemblem.c, src/melee/gr/grtfalco.c, src/melee/gr/grtfox.c, src/melee/gr/grtgamewatch.c, src/melee/gr/grtganon.c, src/melee/gr/grticeclimber.c, src/melee/gr/grtkirby.c, src/melee/gr/grtkoopa.c, src/melee/gr/grtlink.c, src/melee/gr/grtluigi.c, src/melee/gr/grtmario.c, src/melee/gr/grtmars.c, src/melee/gr/grtmewtwo.c, src/melee/gr/grtness.c, src/melee/gr/grtpeach.c, src/melee/gr/grtpichu.c, src/melee/gr/grtpikachu.c, src/melee/gr/grtpurin.c, src/melee/gr/grvenom.c, src/melee/gr/gryorster.c, src/melee/gr/grfigureget.h, src/melee/gr/grizumi.h, src/melee/gr/grkraid.h, src/melee/gr/grlast.h, src/melee/gr/grpstadium.h, src/melee/gr/grtest.c, src/melee/gr/grkongo.c
key_files.role: Additional touched ground/stage source and headers, mostly small one-to-several-line cleanup or declaration/name updates.

what_changed: Renamed many gr/ground functions from address-style or UnkStage names to callback-role names, with evidence in symbols.txt and raw diff examples such as Ground_DemoInit, grStadium_OnInit, grKraid_OnLoad, grFigureGet_OnCheckShadowRender, grBattle_OnTouchLine, and grLast_OnDemoInit.
Updated config/GALE01/scratches.txt to use the renamed grFigureGet_OnInit scratch symbol.
Fixed several internal stage IDs and added remaining IDs according to the PR body.
Changed StageData users so they use the internal stage ID instead of interpreting the first StageData field as a flag.
Touched broad ground/stage source and headers plus small camera, fighter, and mplib call/user sites.
Removed src/melee/gr/grheal.static.h and moved/kept relevant declarations elsewhere, based on the changed-file metadata showing 80 deletions in the static header and additions in grheal.c.
Bot report recorded matched code at 56.21%, +0.01%, +212 bytes, with one new match: main/melee/gr/gricemt grIceMt_801F8A34 from 83.74% to 100.00%.
smart_moves: Used callback table evidence, as stated in the PR body, to replace generic address or UnkStage function names with role names instead of inventing ad hoc semantic names.
Kept renamed symbols synchronized across symbols.txt, scratches.txt, source, and headers, reducing drift between config metadata and C declarations.
Corrected StageData interpretation at the type/usage level rather than preserving misleading flag-style access.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a callback table identifies stage lifecycle slots, callback-role names are better evidence-backed names than address-style or UnkStage placeholders.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Renames functions across several files based on callback table

decomp_lessons.lesson: Do not treat an opaque first field in StageData as a flag when the PR evidence identifies it as the internal stage ID.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Switches StageData usages to correctly use the internal stage ID instead of treating the first field as a flag

decomp_lessons.lesson: Broad symbol renames should be propagated through config metadata and source declarations together to keep scratches, symbols, headers, and call sites searchable under one canonical name.
evidence_refs: changed_files_jsonl: forward.h and multiple gr headers changed

naming_conventions.convention: Ground/stage callback functions use gr<Stage>_<CallbackRole> naming, with observed roles OnDemoInit, OnInit, OnLoad, OnStart, OnTouchLine, and OnCheckShadowRender.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grStadium_OnDemoInit, grStadium_OnInit, grStadium_OnLoad, grStadium_OnStart, grStadium_OnTouchLine, grStadium_OnCheckShadowRender
raw_diff: grBattle_OnDemoInit, grBattle_OnInit, grBattle_OnLoad, grBattle_OnStart, grBattle_OnTouchLine, grBattle_OnCheckShadowRender

naming_conventions.convention: Replace UnkStage0 callback placeholders with the stage-level callback name when callback table evidence supports it.
If a local fn_ symbol is only known to belong to a gr file but not semantically identified, this PR used the file prefix plus address form, e.g. grFigureGet_80219B10 and grLast_8021A9AC.
scope: ground file-local functions with unproven semantics

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Callback-table-driven renaming can improve source organization and metadata without requiring speculative semantic names.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Renames functions across several files based on callback table
raw_diff: repeated callback role renames in symbols.txt

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Correcting structure field meaning can unlock matching or cleanup in dependent code; here the bot reported one gricemt function newly matching after the cleanup set.
evidence_refs: pr_body: StageData internal stage ID correction

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use callback-table evidence for gr stage callback names
accepted_candidate_records.text: For ground/stage code, callback table evidence can justify renaming address-style or UnkStage callback placeholders to gr<Stage>_OnDemoInit, OnInit, OnLoad, OnStart, OnTouchLine, or OnCheckShadowRender.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Renames functions across several files based on callback table

accepted_candidate_records.title: StageData first field should be treated as internal stage ID in this cleanup context
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR explicitly corrected StageData usages to use the internal stage ID rather than treating the first field as a flag.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Switches StageData usages to correctly use the internal stage ID instead of treating the first field as a flag

source_update_candidates.title: Ground stage callback naming pattern
source_update_candidates.text: Ground/stage lifecycle callback symbols in src/melee/gr commonly follow gr<Stage>_OnDemoInit, gr<Stage>_OnInit, gr<Stage>_OnLoad, gr<Stage>_OnStart, gr<Stage>_OnTouchLine, and gr<Stage>_OnCheckShadowRender when callback table evidence identifies the slot.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grStadium, grKraid, grFigure1, grFigureGet, grBattle, grLast, grTCaptain callback renames
source_update_candidates.reason: Could help future naming and symbol-catalog cleanup, but should be curated as a path fact rather than assumed globally.

source_update_candidates.title: StageData internal stage ID field usage
source_update_candidates.text: In the ground/stage code touched by PR #2272, StageData usage should refer to the internal stage ID and not treat the first field as a flag.
evidence_refs: pr_body: fixes internal stage IDs and switches StageData usages to internal stage ID
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential durable type/path fact; needs curator verification against current source definition before promoting.

source_update_candidates.title: Callback-table-backed renames are preferred over address placeholders
source_update_candidates.text: When a table identifies callback roles, use that local table evidence to rename placeholder address symbols to canonical callback-role names, while keeping address-style names for functions whose semantics remain unproven.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Renames functions across several files based on callback table
raw_diff: fn_80219B10 -> grFigureGet_80219B10 while callback functions get semantic role names
source_update_candidates.reason: This aligns with conservative naming but may be worth adding as a specific callback-table example if not already covered.

rejection_notes: Do not infer exact internal stage ID values from the loaded evidence; the slice states fixes/additions but does not show the complete ID table.
Do not claim all touched functions matched; the bot report only identifies one new match in gricemt.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; no human review comments are present.
Do not promote the entire observed callback naming set as a universal rule outside ground/stage code without broader evidence.
